description: Rebrand the self-hosted Jitsi Meet instance (managed in /home/ga/jitsi) for 'FitConnect'. The configuration in /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-interface_config.js must be updated to set APP_NAME to 'FitConnect Pro', DEFAULT_REMOTE_DISPLAY_NAME to 'Fitness Participant', and both SHOW_JITSI_WATERMARK and SHOW_WATERMARK_FOR_GUESTS to false. In /home/ga/.jitsi-meet-cfg/web/custom-config.js, set config.defaultSubject to 'FitConnect Session'. Verify the updated branding by joining a room named 'BrandingTest' at http://localhost:8080. Save a screenshot of the interface to /home/ga/Documents/branding_verification.png and create a report at /home/ga/Documents/branding_report.txt listing the APP_NAME and defaultSubject values.
